generateCharacter.userPrompt: Create a character based on this description: "{description}"

generateCharacterPart.instruction: Instruction: Use the context above to regenerate ONLY the requested section.

avoid.appearance: Do not reuse or paraphrase the baseline appearance. Keep it consistent with the identity and traits.
avoid.traits: Do not reuse the current personality traits, major flaws, or perks. Keep them consistent with the identity and appearance.
avoid.clothing: Do not reuse or paraphrase the current clothing. Keep it consistent with the identity, appearance, and traits.

selectedNpc.header: User-selected NPCs (from library; already exist in this story):
selectedNpc.excludeInstruction: Do NOT include these NPCs or the player character in character_introductions. Only generate additional NPCs not listed here.
selectedNpc.missingChangesInstruction: If any user-selected NPC is missing or needs setup changes, return those values in a root-level object keyed by that exact name, for example: "Eliza": { "current_activity": "..." }.

schemaPrompt.outputRequirements: OUTPUT REQUIREMENTS ({schemaName}): You must output a single JSON object that validates against the following JSON Schema. Do not output the schema. Do not include any surrounding text. Do not add extra keys.

turnOrStoryBase: Use one root-level object per exact character name when a tracked character changes.
Put built-in character fields and enabled custom field ids in that same object.
Use world_state_update.custom_fields only for world fields.
outputShape.turnOrStoryNpcIntroductions: Use character_introductions only for new NPCs, never for the player character, already tracked characters, or selected characters.

rules: Never emit literal placeholder text such as Unknown, unknown, N/A, null, none, or empty labels.
If a detail is missing or unspecified, infer a concrete plausible value from context instead of copying placeholder text.

actionModeHints.say: Say only the exact words spoken. No quotes or 'You say'.
actionModeHints.story: Continue the story in 1-2 short sentences, second-person present tense.
actionModeHints.do: Describe the action the player takes in a short, concrete clause.

chatPrompt.continueWithoutPlayer: Player sent no new message; continue the conversation naturally.
chatPrompt.replyInstruction: Reply as {nextSpeakerName} with message text only.
